### 2372482
**Batwheels S02E21 - Batwing and the Nets**  
🆕 TV-Y 🔒 11:21  
⌛ September 22, 2027 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=1000000000093702&titleid=2372482&mediaid=1a6b1cb08042ccb84839a6e8253c5f42290f84e7) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/batwheels/batwing-and-the-nets-episode.html  
seriesid=`2267111` titleid=`2372482` mediaid=`1a6b1cb08042ccb84839a6e8253c5f42290f84e7`  
_When Batwing's favorite Bat-Net gets ripped during a chase with Riddler, she must learn to let go of her old net (despite it being her favorite) if she's going to help Batman stop the Riddler in his tracks._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2372482_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2141154
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E45 - Some Luck**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔒 11:01  
⌛ September 30, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=1000000000093702&titleid=2141154&mediaid=7dc0cf7ade4eb163512e4d483ff526bb82473c4a) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/some-luck-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141154` mediaid=`7dc0cf7ade4eb163512e4d483ff526bb82473c4a`  
_While the Bears are transporting a Whiffle Wizard to a distant meadow, Good Luck seems to have a run of bad luck. His belief in his own bad fortune causes him to lose confidence, causing ever more "bad luck." It's only when he understands that we make our own luck that his "luck" changes._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141154_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
